events.event_description: U.S. Legation in Russia established when John Quincy Adams presented credentials as Minister Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: John Quincy Adams, Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1809-06-27. Credentials presented: 1809-11-05. Left post on 1814-04-28.

events.event_description: U.S. Legation in Russia elevated to Embassy when Ethan Allen Hitchcock was promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Ethan Allen Hitchcock, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1897-08-16. Credentials presented: 1897-12-16. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1898-03-21.

events.event_description: U.S. Embassy in Russia closed, ending formal diplomatic representation.

evidence.quote: Felix Cole, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Embassy in Russia closed on 1919-09-14.

events.event_description: U.S. Embassy re-established with the USSR when William Christian Bullitt presented credentials as Ambassador, following restoration of diplomatic relations.

evidence.quote: William Christian Bullitt, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1933-11-21. Credentials presented: 1933-12-13. Left Russia 1936-05-16.
